data.title: RIFM's 59th Annual Meeting at Teaneck Marriott on Nov. 6, 2025, to offer new insights to fragrance stakeholders.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, the Research Institute for Fragrance Materials (RIFM) announced their 59th Annual Meeting scheduled for November 6, 2025. The event will take place from 3:30 to 9 p.m. EST at the Teaneck Marriott at Glenpointe in Mahwah, New Jersey. RIFM extended invitations to its members, scientists, and fragrance safety stakeholders to participate in the annual meeting.

data.title: Sunday Swagger and Guinness collaborate on new fall collection, celebrating individuality and tradition with expanded line for men and women.
data.description: In Yorba Linda, California, Sunday Swagger, a popular performance golf and lifestyle apparel company known for its comfort and personality, is launching a new fall collection in collaboration with the iconic brand Guinness®. This marks their second collaboration this year, focusing on individuality, heritage, and tradition. The collection caters to both men and women, with an expanded range of products. The latest Guinness® x Sunday Swagger collection promises to be bolder and more diverse, offering a unique blend of style and quality.

data.title: Federal layoffs underway at White House as shutdown continues.
data.description: In a recent report, it was unveiled that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decline from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 1.8 million, representing a decrease of 200,000 people. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy added 350,000 new jobs over the past month, with the majority of the roles being created in the technology and healthcare sectors. Experts anticipate further improvements in the job market as the economy continues to recover from the impact of the pandemic.
US Government Employees Union: Lawsuit has been filed.
White House official: Federal layoffs will be in the thousands.

data.title: Banks consider launching stablecoin tied to G7 currencies, exploring digital asset benefits for new products.
data.description: A consortium of banks announced their plan to delve into the potential of digital assets through a stablecoin initiative. This move aims to leverage the advantages of digital assets in introducing innovative products to the market.

data.title: Inventor from Laporte, Minn., introduces a new seating and storage bench with two storage units and collapsible seating option.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2025, an inventor from Laporte, Minnesota shared the creation of a new cabinet featuring two individual storage units, collapsible seating, and extra amenities. The inventor expressed intentions to develop the MULTI-FUNCTIONAL SEATING AND STORAGE BENCH to enhance functionality.

data.title: NFPA and State Farm partner for 9th year to promote Fire Prevention Week nationwide, Oct 5-11, 2025. State Farm will deliver thousands of Fire Prevention Week...
data.description: In Quincy, Massachusetts on October 10, 2025, the National Fire Protection Association® (NFPA®) and State Farm® have joined forces for the ninth consecutive year to raise awareness for Fire Prevention Week™, taking place from October 5 to October 11, 2025. As a part of this collaborative initiative, State Farm will distribute numerous Fire Prevention Week materials...

data.title: Trump may cancel meeting with Xi and implement new tariffs after China's rare earth export restrictions, crucial for US industries.
data.description: The president responded with increased economic measures following Beijing's implementation of new constraints on the export of rare earth minerals. These minerals are crucial resources for U.S. automakers and defense manufacturers.

data.title: Utility Award Winners at 2025 E Source Forum praised for customer experience and advertising innovation in front of 500+ industry professionals in Denver.
data.description: In Denver, on October 10, 2025, the 38th annual event brought together over 500 utility professionals to showcase key initiatives. The focus was on customer experience, load flexibility, electrification, affordability, and marketing strategies. E Source, a leader in customer, grid, and energy solutions, facilitated this important gathering.

data.title: Top utility websites in US and Canada expanding language options, CPS Energy and Xcel Energy rank highest in 2025 E Source Website Benchmark of 94 public-facing websites.
data.description: In the recently released 2025 E Source Website Benchmark, CPS Energy and Xcel Energy have emerged as the top performers among 94 public-facing utility websites assessed for usability and feature availability. The evaluation, conducted by E Source, a prominent company specializing in customer, grid, and technology solutions, highlighted the stellar performance of these energy providers. This recognition underscores their commitment to providing user-friendly interfaces and a range of useful features. The evaluation was conducted in Boulder, Colorado, with the results showcasing the exemplary digital offerings of CPS Energy and Xcel Energy compared to their peers in the industry.
